who: small restaurant owners processing 5–15 cash register logs/day
offer: For small restaurant owners processing 5–15 cash register logs/day, inefficient manual entry causes cash flow gaps. We automate expense report generation instead of manual entry into accounting software.
problem: Inefficient manual entry of cash register logs into accounting systems.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small restaurant owners
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to small restaurant owners with demo video
Community forums where restaurant owners share tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
